canonical_answer: At 0s, a person sits on a black tube facing the river; at 4s, two people wade through shallow water near rocks; at 10s, the person wearing blue shirt turns head while the person wearing red floral shirt bends forward; at 16s, the person wearing blue shirt stands with hands on hips while the other bends again.
